languages.text: Неуязвим сингловыми атаками обычного оружия (пулями, мили и тд), только АоЕ атаками огнеметом, взрывом, бластером и тд.

traits.locale_text: Неуязвим сингловыми атаками обычного оружия (пулями, мили и тд), только АоЕ атаками огнеметом, взрывом, бластером и тд.

languages.text: The carnivorous swarm is immune to single attacks made with common ranged and {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}melee{/g} weapons. Only {g|Encyclopedia:AreaOfEffect}area attacks{/g}: flamethrower attacks, plasma attacks, explosive attacks, etc. are effective against this enemy.
languages.original_text: Неуязвим сингловыми атаками обычного оружия (пулями, мили и тд), только АоЕ атаками огнеметом, взрывом, бластером и тд.

traits.locale_text: The carnivorous swarm is immune to single attacks made with common ranged and melee weapons. Only area attacks: flamethrower attacks, plasma attacks, explosive attacks, etc. are effective against this enemy.

languages.text: Плотоядный рой невосприимчив к одиночным атакам обычным оружием дальнего и ближнего боя. Против этого врага эффективны только {g|Encyclopedia:AreaOfEffect}атаки по области{/g} (атаки из огнемета и плазменного оружия, взрывы и т. д.)
languages.original_text: The carnivorous swarm is immune to single attacks made with common ranged and {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}melee{/g} weapons. Only {g|Encyclopedia:AreaOfEffect}area attacks{/g}: flamethrower attacks, plasma attacks, explosive attacks, etc. are effective against this enemy.

traits.locale_text: Плотоядный рой невосприимчив к одиночным атакам обычным оружием дальнего и ближнего боя. Против этого врага эффективны только {g|Encyclopedia:AreaOfEffect}атаки по области{/g} (атаки из огнемета и плазменного оружия, взрывы и т. д.)

Плотоядный рой невосприимчив к одиночным атакам обычным оружием дальнего и ближнего боя. Против этого врага эффективны только {g|Encyclopedia:AreaOfEffect}атаки по области{/g} (атаки из огнемета и плазменного оружия, взрывы и т. д.)

languages.text: La nuée carnivore est immunisée contre les attaques au coup par coup portées avec des armes de {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}mêlée{/g} et à distance ordinaires. Seules les {g|Encyclopedia:AreaOfEffect}attaques de zone{/g} (attaques au lance-flammes, plasma, attaques explosives, etc.) sont efficaces contre un tel ennemi.
languages.original_text: The carnivorous swarm is immune to single attacks made with common ranged and {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}melee{/g} weapons. Only {g|Encyclopedia:AreaOfEffect}area attacks{/g}: flamethrower attacks, plasma attacks, explosive attacks, etc. are effective against this enemy.

traits.locale_text: La nuée carnivore est immunisée contre les attaques au coup par coup portées avec des armes de {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}mêlée{/g} et à distance ordinaires. Seules les {g|Encyclopedia:AreaOfEffect}attaques de zone{/g} (attaques au lance-flammes, plasma, attaques explosives, etc.) sont efficaces contre un tel ennemi.

languages.text: Etçil sürü, sıradan menzilli silahlarla veya {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}yakın dövüş{/g} silahlarıyla yapılan tek saldırılara karşı bağışıktır. Yalnızca alev püskürten, plazma, patlayıcı saldırıları gibi {g|Encyclopedia:AreaOfEffect}alan saldırıları{/g} bu düşmana karşı etkilidir.
languages.original_text: The carnivorous swarm is immune to single attacks made with common ranged and {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}melee{/g} weapons. Only {g|Encyclopedia:AreaOfEffect}area attacks{/g}: flamethrower attacks, plasma attacks, explosive attacks, etc. are effective against this enemy.

traits.locale_text: Etçil sürü, sıradan menzilli silahlarla veya {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}yakın dövüş{/g} silahlarıyla yapılan tek saldırılara karşı bağışıktır. Yalnızca alev püskürten, plazma, patlayıcı saldırıları gibi {g|Encyclopedia:AreaOfEffect}alan saldırıları{/g} bu düşmana karşı etkilidir.

languages.text: 食肉虫群免疫常规远程和{g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}近战{/g}武器的单体攻击。只有{g|Encyclopedia:AreaOfEffect}范围攻击{/g}（如火焰喷射、等离子攻击、爆炸攻击等）才对此敌人有效。
languages.original_text: The carnivorous swarm is immune to single attacks made with common ranged and {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}melee{/g} weapons. Only {g|Encyclopedia:AreaOfEffect}area attacks{/g}: flamethrower attacks, plasma attacks, explosive attacks, etc. are effective against this enemy.

traits.locale_text: 食肉虫群免疫常规远程和{g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}近战{/g}武器的单体攻击。只有{g|Encyclopedia:AreaOfEffect}范围攻击{/g}（如火焰喷射、等离子攻击、爆炸攻击等）才对此敌人有效。

languages.text: El enjambre carnívoro es inmune a los ataques de un solo objetivo que se efectúen con armas a distancia y {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}cuerpo a cuerpo{/g} ordinarias. Solo se le puede afectar con {g|Encyclopedia:AreaOfEffect}ataques de área{/g} (lanzallamas, plasma, explosivos y demás).
languages.original_text: The carnivorous swarm is immune to single attacks made with common ranged and {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}melee{/g} weapons. Only {g|Encyclopedia:AreaOfEffect}area attacks{/g}: flamethrower attacks, plasma attacks, explosive attacks, etc. are effective against this enemy.

traits.locale_text: El enjambre carnívoro es inmune a los ataques de un solo objetivo que se efectúen con armas a distancia y {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}cuerpo a cuerpo{/g} ordinarias. Solo se le puede afectar con {g|Encyclopedia:AreaOfEffect}ataques de área{/g} (lanzallamas, plasma, explosivos y demás).

languages.text: Der Fleisch fressende Schwarm ist immun gegen Einzelangriffe mit gewöhnlichen Fernkampf- und {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}Nahkampfwaffen{/g}. Nur {g|Encyclopedia:AreaOfEffect}Flächenangriffe{/g}: Flammenwerfer-, Plasma-, Explosions- und ähnliche Angriffe sind gegen diesen Feind effektiv.
languages.original_text: The carnivorous swarm is immune to single attacks made with common ranged and {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}melee{/g} weapons. Only {g|Encyclopedia:AreaOfEffect}area attacks{/g}: flamethrower attacks, plasma attacks, explosive attacks, etc. are effective against this enemy.

traits.locale_text: Der Fleisch fressende Schwarm ist immun gegen Einzelangriffe mit gewöhnlichen Fernkampf- und {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}Nahkampf{/g}waffen. Nur {g|Encyclopedia:AreaOfEffect}Flächenangriffe{/g}: Flammenwerfer-, Plasma-, Explosions- und ähnliche Angriffe sind gegen diesen Feind effektiv.

languages.text: 肉食の群れは、通常の長距離武器や{g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}近接武器{/g}による単体攻撃には耐性がある。この敵に有効なのは、{g|Encyclopedia:AreaOfEffect}範囲攻撃{/g}のみである：炎放射器攻撃、プラズマ攻撃、爆発攻撃など。
languages.original_text: The carnivorous swarm is immune to single attacks made with common ranged and {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}melee{/g} weapons. Only {g|Encyclopedia:AreaOfEffect}area attacks{/g}: flamethrower attacks, plasma attacks, explosive attacks, etc. are effective against this enemy.

traits.locale_text: 肉食の群れは、通常の長距離武器や{g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}近接武器{/g}による単体攻撃には耐性がある。この敵に有効なのは、{g|Encyclopedia:AreaOfEffect}範囲攻撃{/g}のみである：炎放射器攻撃、プラズマ攻撃、爆発攻撃など。
